---
title: "POLSCI 300 SP26 Portfolio Projects"
output: html_document
#date: "2023-07-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Welcome!

to the host site for POLSCI 300 portfolio projects. We hope you will enjoy the exceptional work that University of Michigan students have done in this course.

Learn more about the course [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1viJvHs3b0x1bUhcDjKLQVbjuQi08Uo-7wilC0yK5rFA/edit?usp=sharing).

Click a student's name to view their project:

* [Alex Casem: Education and Voter Turnout](https://polsci300.github.io/sp26/acasem)

* [Charles Pelan: How does GDP affect Quality of Life?](https://polsci300.github.io/sp26/pelan)

* [Ethan Sage: Civil Unrest in Russia](https://polsci300.github.io/sp26/saeyur)

* [Junbo Wang: Rule of Law and Voice & Accountability](https://polsci300.github.io/sp26/junbow)

* [Kiarah Johnson: State Abortion Bans & Maternal Mortality Rates](https://polsci300.github.io/sp26/kiarahj)

* [Qun Ma: Income and Party Identification in the United States](https://polsci300.github.io/sp26/qunma)
